title: Planetary ion cannon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Planet_Defender.png|thumb|250px|A [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|V-150 Planetary ion cannon]] firing during the Battle of Hoth.]]
A '''planetary [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]''' was a massive ion weapon that could be used to temporarily or permanently disable electrical systems and penetrate shields. Used mainly in defense, they were also used by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] on anarchic worlds such as [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] to disable ships for looting.

Its power source was usually a dedicated reactor sunken into the ground, and it could be erected in several hours.

A [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|V-150]] was seen on the planet of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The ion cannon fired at—and hit—the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-Star Destroyer]] ''Tyrant'', which left it non-operational and allowed several [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|medium transports]] escape the planet before the Imperial invasion commenced.

Two planetary ion cannons of an unknown model were present during the [[Battle of Artus Prime]] during the [[Empire Reborn]] Crisis.

[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] was a large producer of planetary ion cannons, including the V-150.

*[[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 Planet Defender]]
